title: <div>A friend shares a dark secret with another friend; or, one night before goi
content:
A friend shares a dark secret with another friend; or, one night before going out, a friend uses another friend’s computer and discovers a secret

The secret erodes the friend who discovers it, and needs to share with someone else.

The secret keeps spreading, and eats their friend group alive.

————————————————————-
1: discovery—

A busy work week winds down. Friday still has some light left to her.

J arrives at F’s apartment. F welcomes J, pours him a drink, and leaves him to hang with a few others while he finishes getting dressed.

The friends unwind, discussing potential places to hit over the course of the night.

J’s agent, M, calls and urges him to sign off on the designs so they can get em in before the end of the weekend and have the ball rolling for next week.

J grabs F’s laptop and—

Darkness bombards him he is not ready for, so he closes the browser before he sees whatever it was he think he maybe might’ve seen.
context: From document: A friend shares a dark secret with another friend; or, one night before… — chunk 1 (chunk 1/2)
